name: Veal Francesca
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, sauté the veal until cooked through.
2. Remove from heat and cook noodles until done, then drain.
3. Place noodles at the bottom of a casserole dish.
4. Layer the veal on top of the noodles.
5. Add red sauce over the veal.
6. Arrange eggplant slices on top and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
7. Cover with mozzarella slices.
8. Bake at 350 degrees until golden brown, approximately 57 minutes.
